case_title: CARLOS REYES VS. JULIO BONILLA et al*****CASE TRANSFERRED TO FRESNO COUNTY*****

docket_entries.description: 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF REYES, CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT BONILLA, JULIO DBA FRESNO CITY MOTEL DOES 1 THROUGH 10

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JULIO BONILLA DBA FRESNO CITY MOTEL MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE FROM SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT TO THE SUPERIOR COURT COUNTY OF FRESNO, STATE OF CALIFORNIA. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE TO FRESNO COUNTY IS GRANTED. MOTION IS TIMELY. WITNESSES RESIDE IN FRESNO AND WOULD BE SEVERELY INCONVIENCED BY TRAVELING TO SAN FRANCISCO. ACTIONS FORMING THE BASIS FOR THIS CASE OCCURRED IN FRESNO. ENDS OF JUSTICE WOULD BE PROMOTED BY TRANSFERRING THE CASE TO FRESNO COUNTY. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
TRANSFER ORDER; FEES PAID, TRANSFERRED TO FRESNO COUNTY BY CERT. MAIL NO. 7009 2250 0004 3796 3715 FILED BY DEFENDANT BONILLA, JULIO DBA FRESNO CITY MOTEL

Notice Of Motion For Change Of Venues
Off Calendar Dec-14-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JULIO BONILLA dba Fresno City Motel Motion for Change of Venue from San Francisco Superior Court to the Superior Court County of Fresno, State of California. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for change of venue to Fresno County is granted. Motion is timely. Witnesses reside in Fresno and would be severely inconvienced by traveling to San Francisco. Actions forming the basis for this case occurred in Fresno. Ends of justice would be promoted by transferring the case to Fresno County. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189
